column4: Dialogue

Detecting a spacial rift made by <SenderName>!
Looks like we've got <ItemName> now, sweet.

Ah, looks like <SenderName> sent us <ItemName>.
Should come in handy if we use it.

We've recieved <ItemName> over from <SenderName>!
Hopefully we can use it to its full potential.

CARGO (Class: <ItemName>) INCOMING.
SENDER: <SenderName>

STANDARD PACKAGE RECEIVED: <ItemName>
SENDER: <SenderName>

TEMPORAL RIFT DETECTED. RECEIVED: <ItemName>
SENDER: <SenderName>

<CharacterName>, you got <ItemName>.
Make sure to thank <SenderName> for that.

Oh, we've received <ItemName> for <CharacterName>!
Appreciated, <SenderName>.

We've received <ItemName> from <SenderName>.
Looks like <CharacterName> remembers a little more...

column2: If common artifact is instantly added/enabled:

column4:
Looks like we got <ItemName> from <SenderName>!
It's already been synced with our systems, neat!

...Huh? Looks like we have <ItemName> now.
Appreciate it, <SenderName>!

Oh, power surge! Looks like we've got <ItemName> 
ready, thanks to <SenderName>.

column2: Else, if common artifact is not applied:

column4:
<ItemName> got sent to us by <SenderName>.
We'll able to use it in the future!

<SenderName> sent us over the drivers on <ItemName>.
It'll be compatible with whatever ship we have in the future.

Oh, check the logs, <SenderName> added <ItemName> to them.
If we find it somewhere in one of the sectors, it won't be useless!

column2: If boss artifact is instantly added/enabled:
// If artifact has drawbacks in any way.
column4:
Whoa, big surge of power from <SenderName>!
We got <ItemName> ready now, hope we're fine with the drawbacks!

<SenderName> sent us something real strong, <ItemName>!
This should hopefully help us big time during the loop.

A big help just arrived from <SenderName>, it's <ItemName>!
That's a pretty big power boost, yeah?

column2: Else, if boss artifact isn't applied.

column4:
Hey, if we find <ItemName> now, <SenderName> primed us for it.
Time to consider that into our options now, with how potent it is.

...Looks like we should pay that crystal, or Riggs 2 a visit.
<SenderName> got us <ItemName>, we might salvage it from them.

Whoa!!! Big download for the drivers needed to use <ItemName>!
<SenderName> was the one who sent that over, nice!

HIGH-VALUE CARGO (Class: <ItemName>) INCOMING.
SENDER: <SenderName>

ADVANCED PACKAGE RECEIVED: <ItemName>
SENDER: <SenderName>

TEMPORAL RIFT DETECTED. RECEIVED: <ItemName>
SENDER: <SenderName>

Status report, Riggs is here with <SenderName>'s intervention!
Did we ever get that hand cannon of her's back from the spacialstream?
column7:
Peri's ready to go now, since <SenderName> helped out.
...Though actually, she really needs the nap, so wait until the next loop?

column4:
Hey, Riggs is next-loop ready with the help of <SenderName>.
Maybe I should prepare some boba as a little treat...
column7:
Hey, Peri's on-standby now, thanks <SenderName>!
She'll be happy to get her hands on some firing solutions.

column2: (exception to the SENDER: line here when characters are unlocked)
column4:
DETECTED: PILOT <c=riggs>RIGGS</c> ON STANDBY FROM <SenderName>.
PREPARING TAPIOCA FOR FUTURE CONSUMPTION.
column7:
DETECTED: CAPTAIN <c=peri>HYPERIA</c> ON STANDBY FROM <SenderName>.
UPDATING WEAPON CALIBRATION PREFERENCES.

column4:
Better steady up, since Dizzy's on deck thanks to <SenderName>!
Get it? Steady up. 'Cause it's Dizzy...I'm glad he can't hear me right now.
column7:
Oh, <SenderName> just managed to link us back up with Isaac!
The drone bay was kind of collecting dust, overall.

column4:
Heads-up from <SenderName>, Dizzy's now part of the crew for later!
Make sure there aren't any too many big glowy buttons in the next ship.
column7:
Isaac's back in action, since <SenderName> worked some spacial magic.
Nobody touched Isaac Jr. while he was gone, right?

column4:
DETECTED: RESEARCHER <c=dizzy>DIZZY</c> ON STANDBY  FROM <SenderName>.
REBOOTING ON-BOARD LABRATORY.
column7:
DETECTED: ENGINEER <c=goat>ISAAC</c> ON STANDBY FROM <SenderName>.
INTIALIZING DRONE BAY STERILIZATION.

column4:
We've got Max on-board now because of <SenderName>!
Just going to ignore the requested Max wanted to play for that occasion.
column7:
Oh boy, looks like Drake is back due to <SenderName>...
Making a reminder to invest in some more fire suppression for later.

column4:
Sweet, looks like Max has joined us in cryosleep thanks to <SenderName>. 
...He wanted me to play a recording when he arrived but naaaaah.
column7: I think <SenderName> touched the thermostat, because Drake is on-board now. We'll need to turn the A/C on full-blast once she unthaws.

column4:
AUDIO PLAYBACK INITIATED FROM <SenderName> FOR <c=hacker>MAX</c>. 
"Yeah, neighborhood hacker here. Going to take a quick nap, but wake me up whenever!"
column7:
ALERT: MARAUDER <c=eunice>DRAKE</c> ON-BOARD FROM <SenderName>.
ERROR: AIRLOCK SYSTEM DISABLED. CANNOT ASPHYXIATE.

column4:
Oh nice, Books is back thanks to <SenderName>...
Or maybe she just warped back in all by herself...right into the cryo pod.
column7:
qqqWkeajhg-------d-s23123!!!!!-11111!!!!!...
...Oh cool, <SenderName> gave me manual overrides to our ships, thanks!

column4:
Hey, Books is here now! She wants her regards to be sent to
<SenderName>...so uh, regards sent?
column7:
<c=keyword><SenderName></c>@AP~REMOTE: ~/CC CAT.EXE -unlock
Log: Successfully unlocked <c=comp>CAT</c> for use in run-- WHAT???

column4:
TEMPORAL ANAMOLY DETECTED FROM <SenderName>.
DESIGNATION: <c=shard>BOOKS.</c> TEMPORARY PERMISSIONS GRANTED.
column7:
ERROR: <c=comp>CAT</c> MATRIX UNRECOVERABLE DESPITE <SenderName>
INSTATING TEMPORAL FLAG FOR STANDARD CREW ACCESS; GRANTED.

column4: // Suppose generics can be used for custom crew in the future? Just as generic fallback.

Whoa, we've just got a cryo-pod filled up out of nowhere...or wait, it's from <SenderName>.
Well, should we welcome <CharacterName> aboard for the next loop?

Hey, looks like <CharacterName> is here, just in a cryo-pod now.
You can thank <SenderName> for that.
DETECTED: CREWMATE <c=keyword><CrewmateName></c> ON STANDBY FROM <SenderName>

Looks like <SenderName> helped abate some of <CharacterName>'s amnesia.
I'm still wondering how that's even possible, but we can make progress!

<SenderName> worked some magic, and <CharacterName> is able
to remember better. Let's get them to the Cobalt when we can!
MNESTICS APPLIED TO <CharacterName>, AMNESIA DAMPENED.
DEPLOYED MEMORY ENHANCERS FOR <CharacterName>.

...Huh? Did Books really need the memory booster here too? 
Doubt <SenderName> is a doctor, but if they think its important...
column7:
What the...! One of my memory banks was already encrypted, and then DECRYPTED???
<SenderName> activated that logic...what does that mean?

column4: MEMORY ENHANCERS DEPLOYED FOR BOOKS. ADAPTING TO UNKNOWN PHYSIOLOGY.
column7:
REQUEST FROM: <SenderName>
UNENCRYPTED: CAT MEMORY DATABANK 0x434F42414C54FFFF.

column4:
Books got another memory booster over from <SenderName>.
I guess she does need those boosters after all...the temporalstream is weird.
column7:
Another memory bank unencrypted for me...why these in particular?
...Hmm, well, if <SenderName> wants us to visit the Cobalt for that, let's do it.

column4: ADDITIONAL MEMORY ENHANCERS ADMINISTERED TO BOOKS. ADAPTATION LEVELS 64.12%.
column7:
REQUEST FROM: <SenderName>
UNENCRYPTED: CAT MEMORY DATABANK 0x434F524520594159.

column4:
Look at that, one more memory booster for Books from <SenderName>.
Now is that enough, so I can stop questioning why she needs them???
column7:
...Whoa. I just felt something....ephemeral. Whatever that means in the end,
I think <SenderName>...allowed me to visit the Cobalt to its fullest extent.

column4: FINAL MEMORY ENHANCERS ADMINISTERED TO BOOKS. FULLY ADAPTED.
column7:
REQUEST FROM: <SenderName>
ACCESSING TEMPORAL UPLINK. FINAL CAT MEMORY??? ACCESSIBLE.

column4:
<SenderName> sent us over...well, nothing, really? Just a minor boost. 
Would it be too greedy to hope for something more?

Our generators got boosted a bit by <SenderName>.
Doesn't seem like we got anything else though...

Small surge in power from <SenderName>, but not much else.
At least we didn't get a trap or anything, so it's still appreciated, but...
MINOR GENERATOR SURGE APPLIED.
SMALL POWER BOOST ACTIVATED.

Oh hey, <SenderName> sent us a bunch of cargo!
...Wait, it's way too much cargo...and they're all EMPTY?????

<SenderName> just sent us a Genesis package. After taking what was
inside and leaving us the boxes. Wow!!! Thanks!!!

Detecting a spacial rift made by <SenderName>!
Looks like we've got...got...trash. Just those stupid containers. Great!!!
ALERT: GENESIS DELIVERY ACCEPTED. CARGO CONTENTS: N/A
ALERT: RECEIVED A COPY OF BIG RIGS: OVER THE ROAD RACING
ALERT: RECEIVED ONE WITH NOTHING, BARBARIAN HUT, AND SNAKEBITE.

<SenderName> sent us a Missing Trap...like the trap is missing?
Seems like we should be perfectly fine then! ...Wait a second.

And one of us is just about to get poofed because of <SenderName>.
Well, good thing it can't be me this time around!!!

Ah, one of the crew just vanished! ...<SenderName> was reponsible
for that. Maybe we should send them something 'good' as a thank you!
ALERT: MINIATURE POCKET DIMENSION ON-BOARD.
ALERT: CREW MEMBER MOMENTARILY ON SHORE LEAVE.

Wow, I didn't know <SenderName> was a part of Sunshine Heavy Industries.
BECAUSE THEY JUST MESSED UP OUR WHOLE SHIP!!!

What the...hey, <SenderName> just screwed with our entire ship!
That girl from the shipyard must be cackling right now.

We just got shuffled up from <SenderName>! 
How would they like it if THEY got randomized around???
ALERT: EMERGENCY SWAPPING PROTOCOLS ACTIVATED.
ALERT: SHIP SHUFFLE MODE ACTIVATED.

column2: If we sent a trap previously:

column4:
Yeeeeeah, you all know that prank we sent over to <SenderName>?
They got their revenge with a <TrapName>. Kinda deserved?

Welp! <SenderName> got their vengeance on us with a <TrapName>.
Who could've guessed that would've happened???

Woop woop woop! Alert alert, we just had a <TrapName> impact us!
It was sent by <SenderName>...who we messed with earlier. Coincidence???

Would you look at that, <SenderName> activated a <TrapName> on us.
Nice!!! Maybe reconsider looking for one of their shiny anomolies!

Wow! <SenderName> decided to send us a <TrapName>!
Aren't we supposed to be working together???

Ugh, <SenderName> launched a <TrapName> through the temporalstream.
Let's hope it doesn't mess with us too badly.
ALERT: SUBTERFUGE (Type: <TrapName>) ACTIVATED
ALERT: TROJAN (Name: <TrapName>) DETECTED

Huh??? Now we have <RunModifier> to contend with...
<SenderName> is shaking things up, but I'm not sure if I like that!

Hey, is <SenderName> secretly working with Books or something?
<RunModifier> was just applied to us, and I didn't expect her chaos here!
ALERT: <RunModifier> ACTIVATED. ADJUSTING LOOP PARAMETERS.
